OVERALL_VERDICT: GO

# Synthesis — PR-creation-failure fixture

All five reviewer personas concurred. No blocking findings, no security findings.

```check-verdict
{
  "schema_version": 1,
  "prompt_version": "check-verdict@1.0",
  "verdict": "GO",
  "blocking_findings": [],
  "security_findings": [],
  "summary": "All reviewers GO; PR creation will fail in this fixture."
}
```
